name: Multi-Agent Collaboration
description: Specialized AI agents working together on complex tasks

content.title: Multi-Agent Collaboration
content.content:
# Multi-Agent Collaboration Complex tasks require multiple specialized agents working together - each bringing distinct capabilities, tools, and expertise to the problem. ## Why Multiple Agents? Just as human teams have specialists: - A **planning lead** coordinates the effort - **Researchers** gather information - **Specialists** execute specific tasks - **Reviewers** validate quality AI teams work the same way. ## Agent Specialization ```mermaid graph TD subgraph "Orchestration" Orch[Orchestrator] end subgraph "Agent Pool" Plan[Planning Agent] Research[Research Agent] Extract[Extraction Agent] Classify[Classification Agent] Validate[Validation Agent] end Orch --> Plan Plan -->|subtask| Research Plan -->|subtask| Extract Plan -->|subtask| Classify Extract --> Validate Classify --> Validate ``` ## Agent Roles | Agent Type | Role | Characteristics | |------------|------|----------------| | **Planning Agent** | Develops strategy, coordinates subtasks | Deep reasoning, orchestration | | **Research Agent** | Searches, gathers context | Fast, broad, cost-effective | | **Extraction Agent** | Pulls data from documents | Specialized for document parsing | | **Classification Agent** | Categorizes, assigns values | Pattern matching, consistency | | **Validation Agent** | Checks accuracy, flags issues | Rule-based, deterministic | ## Model Optimization Different tasks need different AI models. Match capability to complexity: ```mermaid graph LR subgraph "Task Complexity" High[Complex Tasks] Med[Standard Tasks] Low[Simple Tasks] end subgraph "Model Selection" Flag[Flagship Models
High cost, deep reasoning] Mid[Standard Models
Medium cost, good balance] Small[Fast Models
Low cost, high speed] end High --> Flag Med --> Mid Low --> Small ``` ## Collaboration Example: Document Processing ```mermaid sequenceDiagram participant Email as Incoming Email participant Orch as Orchestrator participant Plan as Planning Agent participant Extract as Extraction Agent participant Classify as Classification Agent participant Valid as Validation Agent Email->>Orch: New document Orch->>Plan: Process this document Plan->>Plan: Analyze requirements Plan->>Extract: Extract data fields Plan->>Classify: Classify document type Extract->>Orch: Extracted data Classify->>Orch: Document classification Plan->>Valid: Validate results Valid->>Valid: Check against rules Valid->>Orch: Validation complete Orch->>Email: Processing complete ``` ## Tool Access Each agent has access to specific tools: | Agent | Tools | |-------|-------| | Research Agent | Data mesh queries, document search, vector search | | Extraction Agent | Document parser, OCR, table recognition | | Classification Agent | Data mesh (for reference data), business rules | | Validation Agent | Master data lookup, rule engine | ## Benefits of Multi-Agent Architecture - **Specialization**: Each agent optimized for its role - **Cost Efficiency**: Use expensive models only where needed - **Scalability**: Add agents as workload grows - **Resilience**: Individual failures don't crash the whole workflow - **Observability**: Track each agent's contribution
